name: explore_resid_scale_00
hypothesis: ReZero: start with zero residual strength, let it learn from scratch. Different mechanism from LayerScale (0.1). Has worked in deep transformers. Independent axis.

name: explore_stoch_depth_01
hypothesis: Stochastic depth 10% drop rate. Regularization via random layer skipping. May improve generalization even at 500 steps.

name: explore_qk_gain_10
hypothesis: QK attention gain=1.0 (baseline=1.5). Lower init = flatter attention = more uniform token mixing. Unexplored axis.

name: explore_qk_gain_20
hypothesis: QK attention gain=2.0 (baseline=1.5). Higher init = sharper attention = more focused token selection.

name: explore_attnres_vr_gated
hypothesis: Gated value residual. value_residual gave -0.0053. Gated version adds a learned gate — may be more adaptive.

name: explore_gate_floor_00
hypothesis: Gate floor=0.0 (baseline=0.5). Full ReLU² behavior for negative inputs — no leaky term. Tests if the leaky component is actually helping.
